evidence: The paper explicitly avoids impurity importance: "Because the elastic-net model was comparable in terms of performance with the more complex algorithms and yields interpretable feature importance values as OR, the remaining results are presented using the elastic-net model." Variable importance is reported via elastic-net ORs (Table 4), with rankings by absolute coefficient value. The authors note "OR P values were not presented, as they cannot be computed reliably for the elastic-net model." Central conclusions address model performance metrics (ROC AUC 0.912, PR AUC 0.547), not feature importance rankings.
